hero.headline: We build the SaaS growth systems that generate revenue
hero.subheadline: Website. Search. AI visibility. Conversion. One team running all four as a single integrated system. With LoudFace, your SaaS ranks on Google, gets cited by AI engines, and compounds growth.

howWeWork.label: The Autopilot model
howWeWork.headline: We own the program. You own your time.
howWeWork.body: No decks waiting for approval. No task management on your end. We run the roadmap, execute across all three disciplines weekly, and show up every week with progress tied to your pipeline goals — not keyword rankings.

steps.title: Foundation audit
steps.description: Technical health, content gaps, entity coverage, AI engine presence, and conversion audit. Every opportunity scored against pipeline impact.

steps.title: 90-day roadmap
steps.description: 3–5 measurable goals tied directly to demo requests and pipeline. A shared scoreboard you can check anytime. Clear ownership so nothing waits for a decision.

steps.title: Continuous execution
steps.description: SEO, AEO, and CRO work ships weekly. One point of contact across content, technical improvements, link building, AEO optimisation, and conversion testing.

steps.title: Weekly check-in
steps.description: What shipped, how metrics moved, what's next. Every number tied to pipeline outcomes your leadership team actually cares about.

ctaBreak.headline: Want to see where your SaaS pipeline is leaking?
ctaBreak.subheadline: Request a free AI Visibility Audit. No commitment, no pitch. We check your AI search presence, conversion gaps, and top missed opportunities before any sales conversation.

system.label: Growth Autopilot for B2B SaaS
system.headline: Three layers. One integrated system.
system.body: We don't sell SEO, AEO, and CRO as separate services. We run them as one integrated program where each layer feeds the next. SEO builds the authority. AEO makes sure AI engines know about it. CRO makes sure the traffic converts when it arrives.

layers.title: SEO
layers.subtitle: Built for how SaaS buyers actually search, not just how Google ranks pages.

layers.title: AEO
layers.subtitle: Making your brand the answer when buyers ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Google SGE who solves their problem.
items: AI search mention audit across 5+ engines

items.name: Hoxhunt
items.description: B2B SaaS cybersecurity. Full migration with SEO rebuilt from the ground up. 20+ pages launched on a compressed timeline — zero SEO loss, significant organic gains post-migration.

items.name: Outbound Specialist
items.description: A single SEO and conversion-optimised page built with the right messaging architecture. $200,000 in sales closed within 30 days of launch. The only change was the page.

items.name: Dimer Health
items.description: B2B health-tech SaaS. Systematic CRO across key conversion pages — positioning overhaul, trust architecture, copy restructuring. Nearly 3x the conversion rate from the same traffic.

items.name: Toku / Icypeas
items.description: Fintech and B2B SaaS messaging repositioning. Rebuilt the messaging architecture so the value prop landed — and buyers knew immediately if it was for them.

items.question: How is this different from a standard SaaS SEO agency?
items.answer: Most SaaS SEO agencies stop at rankings. We run SEO, AEO, and CRO as one integrated program — so traffic actually converts when it arrives, and your brand shows up in AI search before the buyer ever reaches Google. One team, one system, one north star: pipeline.

items.question: Why does AEO matter specifically for B2B SaaS?
items.answer: B2B SaaS buyers research heavily before talking to sales. A growing share of that research now starts with ChatGPT or Perplexity. If your brand isn't in those answers, you're invisible at the highest-intent moment in the buyer journey. AEO fixes that structurally.

items.question: What makes SaaS SEO different from standard SEO?
items.answer: JavaScript rendering issues mean product pages are often invisible to search engines. The highest-converting content isn't blog posts — it's comparison pages, integration pages, and feature pages. And buyer intent follows a specific arc that generic content strategies ignore. We build for all of it.

items.question: How long before we see pipeline movement?
items.answer: Technical fixes and AEO improvements move within 30–60 days. Comparison and alternatives pages typically rank within 60–90 days. Content authority compounds over 90–180 days. We set 90-day goals tied to pipeline and report against them honestly.

items.question: Do we need to manage the work?
items.answer: No. One point of contact. We own the roadmap and all three disciplines. You review progress weekly and make decisions when they matter — nothing else.

items.question: What does the weekly check-in cover?
items.answer: What shipped across SEO, AEO, and CRO that week. How key pipeline metrics moved. What's coming next. Tied to your 90-day goals — not a vanity dashboard.

bottomCta.headline: Let's find out what's between your traffic and your pipeline.
bottomCta.body: A 30-minute strategy call. We'll look at your current search presence, AI visibility gaps, and conversion leaks, and tell you exactly what the Growth Autopilot program would target first.
bottomCta.disclaimer: No pitch deck. No proposal before the conversation. Just a clear picture of where the gaps are.
